technical_risks.risk: OCR extraction quality may be inconsistent across international receipts.
technical_risks.mitigation: Keep manual correction in the core flow and preserve source receipt values.
technical_risks.next_action: Validate OCR quality assumptions against common receipt formats and languages.

business_risks.risk: Users may not trust organizer-controlled pooled funds without strong transparency cues.
business_risks.mitigation: Emphasize ledger visibility, update cadence, and payout clarity in MVP design and validation.
business_risks.next_action: Validate trust expectations with prospective organizers and supporters.

compliance_risks.risk: Trip contributions and organizer payouts may trigger processor, refund, or KYC compliance requirements.
compliance_risks.mitigation: Constrain MVP to supported payment patterns and define clear contribution and refund policies before launch.
compliance_risks.next_action: Validate payment model against processor capabilities and legal constraints.

operational_risks.risk: Users may confuse trip-wide pooled funds with private event payment tracking.
operational_risks.mitigation: Keep ledgers separate by default and reflect scope clearly in naming, UI, and summaries.
operational_risks.next_action: Test whether users understand ledger separation in concept validation.

operational_risks.risk: Public trip pages, photos, and updates may leak private information or require moderation intervention.
operational_risks.mitigation: Default to private content, require explicit organizer promotion for public highlights, and include moderation/report flows.
operational_risks.next_action: Validate privacy expectations and public highlight policy assumptions.

operational_risks.risk: Translated receipt text or display-only currency conversion may be mistaken for authoritative financial truth.
operational_risks.mitigation: Label localized values clearly and keep original data visible in the receipt record.
operational_risks.next_action: Validate whether users understand source versus display data.

constraints: MVP event payments are tracking-only, not in-app settlement.
Private event expenses do not auto-roll up into the trip ledger.
Currency conversion is for display only.
Trip photos are member-only by default, with organizer-controlled public highlights.
